proposed_title: Australian AIDS Patient Registry — Survival by Transmission Category and Sex
encoding_note: status == "A" (alive) counts as Success; status == "D" (died) counts as Failure. Aggregate Successes/Cases per (T.categ × sex) cell. T.categ has ~7 levels (hs, haem, het, id, hsid, blood, other, mother); sex is M/F. State (NSW etc.) is an alternative stratum.
